author: Simon Ser
message: github/workflows: run CI on release branches

author: Simon Ser
message: xdg_shell: split off initial commit handler to separate function

author: Simon Ser
message:
xdg_shell: explicitly schedule configure for initial commit

Compositors must reply to initial commit with a configure event.
This happens implicitly via set_fullscreen()/view_position(), but
let's be explicit.

author: nodscher
message: xdg_shell: fix windows requesting fullscreen on startup

author: Rudi Heitbaum
message:
build: guard git version detection against missing .git directory

When building from a release tarball, there is no .git directory
and git rev-parse would either fail or pick up a parent repository's
HEAD. Guard the git version detection with fs.is_dir('.git') so
that tarball builds produce a clean version string.

Requires importing the fs module.

Signed-off-by: Rudi Heitbaum <rudi@heitbaum.com>

author: Simon Ser
message:
Create a single wlr_xcursor_manager

No need to create multiple of these: all use the same parameters.

author: Simon Ser
message:
cage: stop using DEFAULT_XCURSOR as a cursor theme name

That's a cursor image name, not a cursor theme name.

NULL means use default.

author: Simon Ser
message:
output: drop unnecessary wlr_xcursor_manager_load() call

wlr_cursor_set_xcursor() takes care of this already.

author: ry
message: ci: update actions/checkout to v4 from v2

author: tjallingt
message: seat: Use XCURSOR_SIZE and XCURSOR_THEME when creating the cursor manager

author: David Cohen
message:
cage: add -x flag to disable XWayland at runtime

Allows disabling XWayland support at runtime even when the binary was
built with it.

author: Simon Ser
message:
seat: change default seat name to "default" from "seat0"

"seat0" is confusing because it's the name used by logind for
physical seats. Logical Wayland seats are completely orthogonal to
login physical seats, so let's switch the name to reduce mixups a
bit.

See the discussion in https://github.com/cage-kiosk/cage/pull/497

author: Simon Ser
message: ci: use "meson setup"

author: Simon Ser
message:
ci: use variables for package lists

Avoids duplicating these.

author: Simon Ser
message: build: bump version to 0.3.0

author: Yuxuan Shui
message:
Make buffer bigger to prevent wayland disconnection

Fixes #492

author: Simon Ser
message:
build: drop cage_heaers

Listing header files is unnecessary, Meson already takes care of
that.

author: Sungjoon Moon
message:
Upgrade wlroots to v0.20

Breaking changes:
 - https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/wlroots/wlroots/-/merge_requests/5230

author: Simon Ser
message:
Fix segfault during cleanup when wlr_scene isn't created

If backend creation fails, server.scene is NULL.

Discovered when investigating the following issue:
https://github.com/cage-kiosk/cage/issues/481

author: Yuxuan Shui
message: Implement the drm-lease-v1 protocol

author: Simon Ser
message:
xwayland: fix crash when request_fullscreen is called while unmapped

Closes: https://github.com/cage-kiosk/cage/issues/463

author: Simon Ser
message:
xdg_shell: skip configure in request_fullscreen handler if unmapped

wlr_xdg_surface_schedule_configure() requires the xdg_surface to
be initialized.

Closes: https://github.com/cage-kiosk/cage/issues/456

author: Yuxuan Shui
message: Fix segfault when title or app_id is NULL

author: Simon Ser
message: xwayland: remove associate/dissociate listeners

author: GnSight
message: Add support for wlr-foreign-toplevel-management

author: Simon Ser
message: build: bump version to 0.2.1

author: Simon Ser
message: Fix renderer, allocator and scene memory leaks on exit

author: Simon Ser
message:
output: use backend commits

Pass the whole new desired state to the backend, so that the
backend can leverage KMS atomic commits.

author: Simon Ser
message:
ci: set --wrap-mode=nodownload

Make sure Meson doesn't automagically download and build
dependencies, so that we use system libraries.

author: Simon Ser
message:
ci: install libdisplay-info

This dependency was missing.
